title: Field Lineage Graph
description: Lineage record for a target field — captures the source fields, transform function chain, and derivation rationale. Every target field must have a lineage entry.

derivationType.description: How the target field was derived

role.description: Role of this field in the derivation, e.g. primary, filter, lookup_key

sourceFieldRefs.description: Source fields contributing to this target field

transformFunctionIds.description: Ordered list of transform function IDs applied

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the derivation decision

lineageVersion.description: Version of the lineage record (increments on correction)
